home.hero_body1: Oatmeal Farm Network is your all-in-one platform connecting the entire food system.
home.hero_body2: Discover local connections through our Food-System Directory, make smarter decisions with Saige's AI insights, and explore over 4,000 plant varieties and 3,000 livestock breeds in our specialized databases. With our upcoming Livestock Marketplace, you'll soon be able to buy and sell directly within the network — helping you grow, connect, and thrive from ground to gourmet.
home.hero_quote: "The future of food is rooted in the wisdom of our past."
home.ecosystem_sub: Four pillars of the modern food network, unified.
home.ecosystem_farm_desc: Grow smarter with modern tools and reliable connections designed to support today's agriculture.
home.ecosystem_ranches_desc: Manage livestock more efficiently while expanding your reach to stronger, more sustainable markets.
home.ecosystem_artisan_desc: Bring your handcrafted goods to a wider, quality-focused audience that values authenticity and craft.
home.ecosystem_restaurants_desc: Connect with trusted local sources to serve fresh, high-quality ingredients with full transparency.
home.news_company_desc: The Oatmeal Farm Network is entering its final phase of technical readiness for our 2026 launch. We are currently onboarding a select group of pilot food businesses and associations to refine our "digital nervous system" before opening the gates to the wider community. Soon, the tools to manage everything from a single restaurant's pantry to a national breed association's registry will be available in one integrated ecosystem.
home.market_news_loading: Loading the latest market and food-system news…
home.market_news_fallback: No recent articles to feature. Browse the full feed for today's pricing shifts, supply and demand changes, seasonal forecasts, and key industry developments.
home.feat_precision_desc: An integrated precision agriculture solution that turns field data into actionable insights. Monitor crop health with satellite data, receive real-time alerts for stress or pests, and use predictive analytics to optimize yield, irrigation, and nutrient planning.
home.feat_farm2table_desc: A farm-to-table ecosystem that connects producers directly with chefs, restaurants, and consumers. Easily source fresh, local products, manage orders with smart logistics, and ensure full transparency with traceable product origins.
home.feat_association_desc: A support program that equips food-system organizations with modern digital tools at no cost. Get a custom website, seamless event management, and earn a share of platform fees to support your community.
home.feat_livestock_desc: A data-driven livestock marketplace built for transparent buying, selling, and management. Access verified animal profiles, discover quality genetics for breeding, and make informed decisions with complete lifecycle visibility.
home.feat_events_desc: A streamlined event management system designed for associations and producers. Easily create events, track registrations in real time, and offer seamless ticketing with fully branded event pages — all in one place.
home.feat_ai_desc: Industry-specific AI assistants designed to support every role in the ecosystem. From optimizing farm operations to managing restaurant inventory and streamlining artisan production, each AI helps automate workflows and improve decision-making.
home.feat_chef_desc: An intelligent inventory system that connects your kitchen directly to its supply chain. Track ingredients in real time, automate restocking, and manage costs with up-to-date pricing — all while sourcing seamlessly from local producers.
home.feat_website_desc: An AI-powered website builder and CMS designed for producers with no technical skills. Instantly create a professional site, manage content with simple commands, and keep everything updated in real time.
home.feat_knowledge_desc: A comprehensive knowledgebase built as a trusted source of truth for the food ecosystem. Explore detailed data on plant varieties, livestock breeds, and ingredients to support better decisions across agriculture and culinary industries.

contact.title: Contact The Oatmeal Farm Network
contact.subtitle: Have questions about the Oatmeal Farm Network or our upcoming AI virtual consultants? Complete the form below and our team will get back to you shortly.

for_biz.ready_body: Free to join. All tools are included with your account — no add-ons, no per-feature pricing.
for_biz.farms_hero_sub: Everything a modern farm operation needs — from satellite field monitoring to selling your harvest directly to chefs and consumers.
for_biz.farms_what: Whether you grow vegetables, raise livestock, or do both, OFN gives your farm a full digital toolkit: precision agriculture, AI advisory, direct-to-consumer sales, a custom website, and connections to the broader food system.
for_biz.farms_tool1_body: Monitor every field from space using six vegetation indices. Track crop health, soil moisture, GDD accumulation, and climate stress events in real time.
for_biz.farms_tool2_body: Ask Saige anything about your crops, soil, livestock, weather risk, or markets. She reads your field records and gives answers grounded in your actual operation.
for_biz.farms_tool3_body: List your animals for sale to verified buyers across the country. Browse genetics, connect with breeders, and manage the whole transaction on-platform.
for_biz.farms_tool4_body: Sell your produce, eggs, meat, and artisan goods directly to restaurants and consumers. Set your own prices, manage orders, and get paid through Stripe.
for_biz.farms_tool5_body: Launch a professional farm website in an afternoon. Farm-aware widgets pull your inventory, animals, events, and blog automatically — no copy-pasting required.
for_biz.farms_tool6_body: Your farm appears in the OFN food-system directory, putting you in front of chefs, consumers, and buyers actively searching for local producers.
for_biz.farms_tool7_body: Host farm tours, field days, workshops, and CSA open houses through OFN. Handle tickets, check-in, and post-event follow-ups without a separate platform.
for_biz.farms_tool8_body: Connect your farm to breed registries, grower cooperatives, and food-system associations that share the platform fees their members generate.
for_biz.ranches_hero_sub: A full toolkit for livestock operations — buy and sell animals, monitor pastures, manage breeding records, and connect with the associations that matter to your herd.
for_biz.ranches_what: OFN was built with ranching in mind. The livestock marketplace supports 28 species. The AI advisor knows parasite management and breeding calendars. The precision ag suite monitors pasture health from space. And your ranch gets a custom website that stays in sync with your records.
for_biz.ranches_tool1_body: Buy and sell across 28 species with verified animal profiles, complete health histories, and genetics data. The most data-rich livestock marketplace in agriculture.
for_biz.ranches_tool2_body: Nutrition plans, parasite management calendars, breeding schedules, and livestock health guidance — all tuned to your herd and region.
for_biz.ranches_tool3_body: Track pasture health and biomass across every paddock with satellite imagery. Know which pastures are stressed before your animals show it.
for_biz.ranches_tool4_body: A professional ranch website that pulls your animal listings, events, and blog directly from your OFN account — no duplicate data entry.
for_biz.ranches_tool5_body: Get found by buyers, breeders, and associations searching the OFN directory for ranches like yours.
for_biz.ranches_tool6_body: Run livestock shows, auctions, breed showcases, and ranch tours through OFN — with judge portals, barn card printing, and direct Stripe payouts.
for_biz.ranches_tool7_body: Connect your ranch to breed registries and associations on OFN. Share your animals' registry records directly from your account.
for_biz.ranches_tool8_body: List your grass-fed beef, pastured pork, and specialty meats directly to restaurants and consumers looking for traceable, local sources.
for_biz.artisan_hero_sub: A dedicated marketplace, AI craft assistant, and professional website — built for mills, bakers, cheesemakers, and every kind of small-batch producer.
for_biz.artisan_what: OFN gives artisan producers a direct channel to restaurants and consumers, a curated ingredient sourcing network, and an AI assistant who actually understands your craft. Rosemarie knows flour extraction rates, curd cuts, and fermentation schedules — and she keeps it tied to your actual shop.
for_biz.artisan_tool1_body: Sell your processed foods, specialty goods, and artisan products directly to chefs, restaurants, and consumers. Set your own prices and manage orders on your schedule.
for_biz.artisan_tool2_body: Get production guidance, manage incoming wholesale orders, track par levels, and source raw ingredients — all from one conversation. Rosemarie knows your craft.
for_biz.artisan_tool3_body: Browse live listings for grain, dairy, fruit, honey, and specialty crops from farms across OFN. Filter by ingredient, region, and certification.
for_biz.artisan_tool4_body: A professional website with your product catalog, story, and blog built in. Your OFN product listings populate your site automatically — no duplicate entry.
for_biz.artisan_tool5_body: Share your process, your sourcing story, and seasonal releases. Your blog lives on your website and in the OFN directory — one post, two audiences.
for_biz.artisan_tool6_body: Appear in the artisan producers section of the OFN food-system directory, searchable by product type, region, and specialty.
for_biz.artisan_tool7_body: Host workshops, vendor fair booths, farm dinners, and tasting events through OFN. Collect registrations, manage capacity, and follow up with attendees.
for_biz.artisan_tool8_body: Connect with food-craft guilds, grower cooperatives, and producer associations that support artisan businesses at every scale.
for_biz.restaurants_hero_sub: A complete sourcing platform that connects your kitchen directly to the farms that supply it — with an AI sous chef built in.
for_biz.restaurants_what: OFN gives restaurants a single place to discover local farms, manage sourcing relationships, plan menus around what's in season, cost plates against live prices, and build a professional online presence — all with Pairsley, your AI food-service partner, riding along on every page.
for_biz.restaurants_tool1_body: Your complete sourcing suite — farm marketplace, saved farms, standing orders, weekly harvest digest, recipe library, and plate costing in one dashboard.
for_biz.restaurants_tool2_body: Browse fresh produce, pastured meats, specialty dairy, and artisan goods from farms in your region. Filter by product, distance, and availability.
for_biz.restaurants_tool3_body: Ask Pairsley what's available from your farms this week, get a seasonal menu drafted, cost a plate, or set up a standing order — all from one conversation.
for_biz.restaurants_tool4_body: A professional restaurant website with your story, menu, farm partners, and blog. Lavendir AI can scrape your existing site and help you rebuild it on OFN.
for_biz.restaurants_tool5_body: Your restaurant appears in the OFN food-system directory alongside the farms and producers you source from — a natural fit for farm-to-table positioning.
for_biz.restaurants_tool6_body: Host farm dinners, tasting events, chef's table experiences, and cooking workshops through OFN — with ticketing, meal selection, and seating management.
for_biz.restaurants_tool7_body: Tell your farm relationship story. A built-in blog lets you highlight your suppliers, seasonal specials, and the provenance behind your menu.
for_biz.restaurants_tool8_body: Connect with culinary guilds, slow food chapters, and farm-to-table associations that support restaurant and chef communities on OFN.

about.title: Supporting Agriculture
about.tagline: We empower farmers and ranchers with the tools to make smarter decisions, reach new markets, and build the future of agriculture.
about.body1: In today's agricultural landscape, success means more than just a good harvest or a healthy herd. It means leveraging cutting-edge technology to operate more efficiently and building direct connections to the communities you feed.
about.body2: The Oatmeal Farm Network was built for this new era. We combine a vibrant, connected community with the revolutionary power of Oatmeal AI to give you an unmatched advantage.
about.ai_body: Stop guessing and start knowing. Our network is exclusively powered by Oatmeal AI, delivering intelligent agents that analyze data, offer predictive insights, and help streamline your entire operation.
about.h2_ecosystem: More Than a Network: A Complete Ecosystem
about.ecosystem_body: Break free from traditional barriers and connect to a larger world. The Oatmeal Farm Network is your gateway to a vast ecosystem designed to help you grow.
about.li_livestock: The Livestock Marketplace: Showcase your animals to a nationwide audience and connect with serious buyers through our online marketplace.
about.li_directory: The Food-System Directory: From seed to supper, find new partners, suppliers, and customers in our comprehensive directory.
about.li_farm2table: Farm-to-Table Initiatives: We provide the tools and connections you need to build a thriving direct-to-consumer business.
about.ready_body1: You're not just a user; you're a member of a community that understands the challenges and triumphs of agriculture.
about.ready_body2: Join us, and let's grow the future of agriculture, together.

livestock_mkt.title: Connecting Ranches Across The United States
livestock_mkt.intro1: Livestock of America is a one-of-a-kind livestock marketplace, helping ranches showcase their animals online. We support all livestock breeders, regardless of breed or type.
livestock_mkt.intro2: From the rugged Pacific coast to the historic shores of Plymouth, Livestock of America connects the breeders of animals who live off the land. These men and women keep our country fed, and we are proud to help them succeed.

saige.hero_body: Your AI agricultural assistant — crops, livestock, soil health, weather impacts, and farm operations, available 24/7 and tuned to the realities of running a real farm.
saige.what_body: Saige is a conversational AI built on top of the Oatmeal Farm Network knowledge base. She combines retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over thousands of curated agricultural documents with live tools that read and update your farm's records — animals, fields, precision-ag data, blog posts, events, and more. She remembers context across conversations and learns what matters to your operation over time.
saige.cap1_body: Planting dates, rotation plans, cover crops, soil amendments, and pest/disease identification — region-aware and variety-specific.
saige.cap2_body: Nutrition, breeding calendars, parasite management, and record-keeping for cattle, sheep, goats, poultry, and more.
saige.cap3_body: Frost risk, heat stress, drought mitigation, and crop-insurance guidance tied to your actual location.
saige.cap4_body: Price forecasts, subsidies, and input-cost watches to inform planting, marketing, and cash-flow decisions.
saige.cap5_body: Drafts blog posts, product descriptions, and social updates directly into the tools you already use on OFN.
saige.cap6_body: Adds animals, logs precision-ag notes, creates events, and updates inventory — all through conversation.
saige.diff_title: How Saige is different from a general chatbot
saige.diff1_body: Saige can read and update your animals, fields, inventory, and blog — not just answer questions.
saige.diff2_body: Saige's retrieval layer is built from curated agricultural content, not random web pages.
saige.diff3_body: Short-term context in the current conversation and long-term memory about your operation.
saige.diff4_body: Saige turns advisory sessions into teaching moments when you want to go deeper.
saige.diff5_body: Destructive actions require confirmation; drafts sit in a review queue, not on your public site.
saige.cta_title: Ready to talk farming with Saige?
saige.cta_body: Free for every OFN member. Join the network or jump straight in.

ai_agents.hero_body: Five purpose-built AI agents — each designed for a specific role in the food system. From the field to the kitchen to your website, there's an agent ready to help.
ai_agents.intro: Every agent on OFN is purpose-built for a specific corner of the food system. They share your account data, talk to the same backend, and operate within guardrails — destructive actions always require your confirmation, and drafts sit in a review queue before going live.
ai_agents.saige_desc: Saige is your always-on farm advisor — equal parts agronomist, livestock manager, and field-data analyst. She combines a curated agricultural knowledge base with live access to your fields, animals, and precision-ag records, so her advice is grounded in what's actually happening on your operation.
ai_agents.saige_cap1: Crop & soil advisory — planting dates, rotation plans, soil amendments, pest ID
ai_agents.saige_cap2: Livestock health & breeding — nutrition, parasite management, record-keeping
ai_agents.saige_cap3: Weather & risk — frost alerts, heat stress, drought mitigation tied to your location
ai_agents.saige_cap4: Manages your records — adds animals, logs field notes, creates events from chat
ai_agents.saige_cap5: Drafts blog posts, product descriptions, and social content in your voice
ai_agents.pairsley_audience: For chefs, restaurateurs, and professional kitchens
ai_agents.pairsley_desc: Pairsley plugs directly into the OFN farm-to-table marketplace so every answer is grounded in real inventory from real farms near you. She helps you write tonight's specials, cost a plate, source a short order, and manage your standing relationships — and she can make account changes for you directly from inside the chat.
ai_agents.pairsley_cap1: What's available this week — real-time inventory from your saved farms
ai_agents.pairsley_cap2: Seasonal menu help — draft specials and tasting menus around what's ripe
ai_agents.pairsley_cap3: Plate costing & margin — cost a dish with live wholesale prices
ai_agents.pairsley_cap4: Standing orders — set up recurring orders and adjust on the fly
ai_agents.pairsley_cap5: Account changes from chat — update your profile, website, and slogan without leaving the conversation
ai_agents.rosemarie_tagline: AI Assistant for Artisan Food Producers
ai_agents.rosemarie_audience: For mills, bakers, cheesemakers, picklers, preservers & small-batch shops
ai_agents.rosemarie_desc: Rosemarie knows flour extraction rates and sourdough hydration. She knows curd cuts and cave humidity. She keeps it all tied to your recipes, your batches, and your ingredient suppliers on OFN — so the advice is grounded in your actual shop, not a generic textbook.
ai_agents.rosemarie_cap1: Source raw ingredients — browse live OFN listings for grain, milk, fruit, honey, and meat
ai_agents.rosemarie_cap2: Par levels & restock drafts — auto-draft multi-farm orders when inventory dips below threshold
ai_agents.rosemarie_cap3: Incoming wholesale orders — confirm, reject, or ship orders from chefs and restaurants via chat
ai_agents.rosemarie_cap4: Craft knowledge base — milling, fermentation, cheesemaking, and food-safety guidance
ai_agents.rosemarie_cap5: Profile & listings — update your business and see what you're selling at a glance
ai_agents.thaiyme_audience: For event organizers and business account holders
ai_agents.thaiyme_desc: Thaiyme sits inside your accounting and event registration pages, ready to help you make sense of the numbers and the registrant data. He can explain revenue trends, surface anomalies, suggest next steps, and make small changes to event registrations on your behalf — all without you leaving the page you're already on.
ai_agents.thaiyme_cap1: Accounting assistant — explains revenue, expenses, and trends in plain language
ai_agents.thaiyme_cap2: Event registration — reviews registrant lists, flags issues, and makes small edits on request
ai_agents.thaiyme_cap3: Context-aware — knows which page you're on and loads the relevant data automatically
ai_agents.thaiyme_cap4: PII-safe — sensitive attendee data is redacted server-side before it reaches the AI
ai_agents.thaiyme_cap5: Action confirmation — all write actions require your explicit approval before executing
ai_agents.lavendir_audience: For anyone building or redesigning a website on OFN
ai_agents.lavendir_desc: Lavendir is the AI co-pilot inside the OFN Website Builder. She can scrape your existing site to capture your brand's colors, fonts, and layout, then use that context to help you rebuild or migrate to OFN. Ask her to draft a new page, suggest a layout, or write your hero copy — publishing always requires your review.
ai_agents.lavendir_cap1: Brand scraping — captures your existing site's colors, fonts, and nav style automatically
ai_agents.lavendir_cap2: Page drafting — generates full page layouts with your brand context already applied
ai_agents.lavendir_cap3: Hero copy — writes your headline, subhead, and CTA text to match your voice
ai_agents.lavendir_cap4: Layout suggestions — recommends widget arrangements and section orders
ai_agents.lavendir_cap5: Always in review — every suggestion is a draft; you publish what you approve
ai_agents.common_title: What every agent has in common
ai_agents.trait1_body: Each agent reads and writes your actual OFN records — animals, fields, inventory, events, and blog posts — not a sandboxed demo.
ai_agents.trait2_body: No agent makes a destructive or publish-worthy change without your explicit approval. Drafts stay in queue until you say go.
ai_agents.trait3_body: All five agents are included at no extra cost with any OFN account. The agent you see depends on which pages you use.
ai_agents.cta_title: Ready to put them to work?
ai_agents.cta_body: Free with any OFN account. Each agent appears automatically on the pages where they're most useful.

ag_support.hero_body: Turnkey event registration and custom digital tools for associations, shows, and ag organizations — built from the ground up for livestock, fiber, and food-system communities.
ag_support.events_body: Most event platforms don't understand livestock shows, fiber festivals, or farm tours. Ours was built for exactly these — with the right registration fields, the right check-in tools, and the right post-event workflow for the ag world.
ag_support.ef1_body: Livestock shows, fiber festivals, farm tours, auctions, vendor fairs, conferences, workshops, farm dinners, competitions, certifications — each has its own registration flow tuned to what you need to collect.
ag_support.ef2_body: Sell multiple ticket tiers, meal plans, and optional packages in one checkout. Promo codes, waitlists, and refund handling are all built in.
ag_support.ef3_body: Each event gets a fully branded public page with your logo, schedule, and description. Attendees register directly — no third-party redirects.
ag_support.ef4_body: Scan QR codes on arrival, print nametags, barn cards, and class sheets from the same dashboard. Broadcast day-of announcements to checked-in attendees.
ag_support.ef5_body: Competition events include a judge portal for livestock, fleece, and fiber arts classes. Conferences get speaker portals, agenda builders, and certificate printing.
ag_support.ef6_body: Watch registration and revenue in real time. Stripe payouts go directly to your account — no waiting on a middleman to cut a check after the event.
ag_support.ef7_body: Every registration builds a clean attendee list you own. Send follow-ups, year-over-year invitations, and newsletters directly from the platform.
ag_support.ef8_body: Exhibitors can scan attendee badges to capture leads instantly. Export contacts at the close of each show for seamless follow-up.
ag_support.assoc_body: Breed registries, fiber guilds, grower co-ops, and food-system associations get a full digital home on OFN — a custom website, directory presence, event tools, and a revenue share from the platform fees their members generate.
ag_support.af1_body: Your association gets a fully custom website powered by the OFN Website Builder — drag-and-drop, farm-aware widgets, custom domain, built-in blog, and SSL. No developer required.
ag_support.af2_body: Your organization appears in the Oatmeal Farm Network directory, putting you in front of thousands of farms, ranches, producers, and consumers actively using the platform.
ag_support.af3_body: Run your annual show, field day, or conference on the same platform as your website. Registration pages link directly from your site with no extra setup.
ag_support.af4_body: Post breed news, policy updates, and member spotlights. Your blog lives on your website and appears in the OFN news feed — one post, two audiences.
ag_support.af5_body: Associations earn a share of platform fees generated by their members — a passive revenue stream that grows as your member base uses OFN tools.
ag_support.af6_body: Members join your association through OFN and link their farm or business profile to your organization. Track membership, send broadcasts, and stay connected.
ag_support.cta_body: Free to join. Simple RSVPs are always free to host. Paid events carry a low platform fee.

dir_about.hero_body: A searchable directory of farms, ranches, mills, bakers, chefs, and agricultural businesses — all on Oatmeal Farm Network. Filter by product, livestock breed, certification, region, and more.
dir_about.biz_card_title: Your business card on the public internet
dir_about.biz_card_body: Every OFN account gets a directory profile — no tiered pricing, no "premium listing" upsell. Photos, story, products, events, and contact info in one place, at an address you can hand out. The directory is how chefs find new suppliers, how breeders find new bloodlines, and how community members find the people growing their food.
dir_about.feat1_body: Every OFN account gets a directory profile. No tiered pricing to get listed.
dir_about.feat2_body: Hero photo, story, logo, contact, address map, product gallery, and linked events and blog posts.
dir_about.feat3_body: Directory pages are public and indexable. Buyers searching for your breed or your county can find you on Google.
dir_about.feat4_body: Your directory profile updates automatically when you add products, animals, or events. No double data entry.
dir_about.cta_body: Free with any OFN account. Claim your business card and fill it in — it takes about fifteen minutes.

mkt_about.hero_body: List your farm products once and they show up everywhere buyers are looking — Farm 2 Table for chefs, the general Products marketplace for consumers, and the Livestock marketplace for ranches. Stripe payouts, messaging, and order tracking are built in.
mkt_about.three_body: Every product you add to OFN flows into the right marketplaces automatically. A case of heirloom tomatoes shows up in Farm 2 Table for chefs. A pint of raspberry jam goes into the Products marketplace for direct-to-consumer. A registered Angus bull goes into the Livestock marketplace for other ranches. One record, many storefronts.
mkt_about.m1_body: Wholesale to chefs, restaurants, and professional kitchens. Wholesale pricing unlocks for verified buyers.
mkt_about.m2_body: Direct-to-consumer for jams, baked goods, eggs, produce, meat shares, honey, fiber — the whole farm shop.
mkt_about.m3_body: Breeding stock, stud service, and sale animals across cattle, sheep, goats, poultry, and more.
mkt_about.feat1_body: Connect your Stripe account and get paid directly. We never touch the money — your payouts land in your bank.
mkt_about.feat2_body: Show retail by default and unlock wholesale pricing for verified restaurant and co-op buyers.
mkt_about.feat3_body: Every product can print a provenance card showing the farm, the field, and the animal it came from.
mkt_about.feat4_body: Questions about harvest dates, cuts, or dietary details flow into your OFN inbox — not a spam folder.
mkt_about.feat5_body: Confirm, reject, and ship orders from one dashboard. Tracking numbers and ETAs flow back to the buyer automatically.
mkt_about.feat6_body: Listings know when produce is ready and fall off the marketplace when the window closes — no dead listings.
mkt_about.cta_body: Free to list. Standard Stripe fees apply to payouts. No OFN commission on your first $1,000 in sales.

events_about.hero_body: Turnkey event management for the ag world — fiber festivals, livestock shows, farm tours, auctions, vendor fairs, conferences, competitions, workshops. Registration, ticketing, meals, check-in, payouts, and post-event certificates, all in one place.
events_about.shape_title: Built for every shape of ag event
events_about.shape_body: We started with fiber festivals and livestock shows — things most event platforms don't handle well. Now we run the whole calendar: workshops, conferences, auctions, farm tours, vendor fairs, dinners, competitions, and RSVP-only community gatherings. Each event type has its own registration flow tuned to what attendees actually need to tell you.
events_about.feat1_body: Sell multiple ticket tiers, optional meal plans, and add-ons. Promo codes, waitlists, and refunds are all included.
events_about.feat2_body: Print nametags, barn cards, and class sheets. Scan people in on arrival. Broadcast day-of announcements.
events_about.feat3_body: Real-time attendance, revenue, and demographics — plus Stripe payouts straight to the organizing account.
events_about.feat4_body: Competition events include a judge portal for fleece, halter, fiber arts, spin-offs, and more.
events_about.feat5_body: Conferences include speaker portals, agenda builders, and certificate printing for attendees.
events_about.feat6_body: Every event builds a clean mailing list you own. Send follow-ups, year-over-year invites, and newsletters.
events_about.cta_body: Free to host simple RSVPs. Paid tickets carry a low platform fee plus Stripe's standard payment processing.

precision.hero_body: Satellite imagery, climate forecasting, soil intelligence, and yield prediction — unified into one platform that turns field data into decisions you can act on today.
precision.what_body: OatSense is OFN's precision agriculture suite — a full set of tools that connect satellite imagery, weather models, soil records, and field observations into a single coherent picture of your operation. Whether you're managing one field or fifty, the platform scales with you and keeps every decision grounded in real data.
precision.feat1_body: Track field health from space using six vegetation indices — NDVI, NDRE, EVI, GNDVI, MSAVI2, and NDWI. View color-coded maps, run time-series analyses, and catch crop stress weeks before it becomes yield loss.
precision.feat2_body: Get ahead of heatwaves, hard freezes, high-VPD drought events, heavy rain, and damaging wind. Each forecast includes onset timing, duration, peak intensity, and AI-generated recommended actions tailored to your crop type.
precision.feat3_body: Log soil samples with pH, N, P, K, calcium, magnesium, CEC, and organic matter. Pair that with irrigation deficit forecasts — urgency levels tell you exactly when and how much to water, field by field.
precision.feat4_body: Accumulate GDD against crop-specific models and watch milestone markers — emergence, tillering, flowering, grain fill, maturity — update in real time. Harvest timing predictions are recalculated as the season progresses.
precision.feat5_body: Record pest, disease, weed, nutrient, and irrigation observations with severity ratings and GPS coordinates. The activity log captures every field operation — spray, fertilize, tillage, irrigation, harvest — in a searchable timeline.
precision.feat6_body: Automatically segment your fields into high, medium, and low performance zones using k-means clustering on your satellite indices. Generate variable-rate application prescriptions for seed, fertilizer, or chemicals from those zones.
precision.feat7_body: Predict end-of-season yield with high, medium, or low confidence based on NDVI trends, GDD accumulation, and historical baselines. Track forecast accuracy over time to calibrate the model to your specific conditions.
precision.feat8_body: Monitor soil organic matter trends and get a carbon sequestration score that reflects your management practices. Plan multi-year crop rotations to optimize soil health, reduce pest pressure, and meet sustainability goals.
precision.feat9_body: All critical signals — NDVI decline, pest or disease flags, irrigation urgency, frost risk — surface in one prioritized alert feed. Color-coded severity means you know at a glance what needs attention today versus this week.
precision.feat10_body: Generate print-ready or emailable field assessment reports with health scores, satellite analysis summaries, soil data, and agronomic recommendations. Share directly with agronomists, lenders, or buyers.
precision.step1_body: Draw field boundaries on the map or enter coordinates. Assign a crop type, planting date, and any soil data you have on hand.
precision.step2_body: Satellite passes update your vegetation indices on every clear-sky overpass. Weather models pull hourly forecasts for your exact coordinates.
precision.step3_body: Alerts surface the highest-priority issues. Reports package everything for your agronomist, lender, or co-op in one click.
precision.cta_title: Ready to see your fields from space?
precision.cta_body: Free with any OFN account. Add your first field and get your first satellite analysis in minutes.

web_build.hero_body: Launch a professional farm website in an afternoon — not three months. Every widget is farm-aware, so your inventory, ranch profile, blog, and events stay in sync with the rest of your account.
web_build.what_body: A drag-and-drop site builder tuned for over 25 types of organizations. Pick from farm-aware widgets that already know about your inventory, your animals, your events, and your blog posts — drop them onto a page and they populate themselves. No copy-paste. No re-entering data.
web_build.feat1_body: Product catalogs, animal-of-the-week, upcoming events, blog feeds, testimonials, contact forms, photo galleries — all drag-and-drop.
web_build.feat2_body: Add an animal or list a product once, and it appears on your website, your OFN directory profile, and the marketplace automatically.
web_build.feat3_body: Point your own domain at your OFN site in minutes. SSL is automatic; DNS is straightforward — we walk you through it.
web_build.feat4_body: Need a new page? Ask Lavendir, our design-assistant AI, to draft it for you. Publishing still requires your review.
web_build.feat5_body: Every layout is responsive by default. Preview desktop, tablet, and phone side-by-side before you publish.
web_build.feat6_body: Your OFN blog lives on your website and in the OFN directory. Write once, reach both audiences.
web_build.cta_body: Free with any OFN account. Start from a template and publish in under an hour.

pairsley.hero_body: Your AI food-service partner — for restaurateurs, chefs, and professional kitchens. Sourcing, seasonal menus, dish costing, and vendor relationships, all grounded in the actual farms near you.
pairsley.what_body: Pairsley is a conversational AI purpose-built for people who cook for a living. She knows your concept, your vendors, your menu structure, and the produce, meat, and artisan goods on offer from farms in your region. She helps you write tonight's specials, cost a plate, chase down a short order, and keep your saved-farm roster tight — and she can make profile changes for you directly, from inside the chat.
pairsley.cap1_body: Real-time view of what's harvestable and in inventory at farms near you — and a weekly email digest if you'd rather have it pushed.
pairsley.cap2_body: Draft specials and tasting menus tuned to what's actually ripe, with allergen notes and ingredient sourcing baked in.
pairsley.cap3_body: Cost out a dish with current wholesale prices from your saved farms and price it to your target food cost.
pairsley.cap4_body: Track your saved farms, recurring orders, and standing relationships — Pairsley keeps the roster tidy.
pairsley.cap5_body: Set up weekly standing orders with farms and adjust on the fly when something is short or something new comes in.
pairsley.cap6_body: Update your restaurant profile, website, slogan, and contact info without leaving the conversation.
pairsley.connected_title: Built on top of the farm-to-table marketplace
pairsley.connected_body: Pairsley plugs directly into the rest of the restaurant toolkit on Oatmeal Farm Network, so every answer is grounded in real inventory and real farms:
pairsley.tile1_body: Browse produce, meat, and processed foods from farms in your region.
pairsley.tile2_body: Your saved-farm list for quick re-ordering and standing relationships.
pairsley.tile3_body: Recurring weekly orders from the farms you trust most.
pairsley.tile4_body: An email every week with everything available now — perfect for menu planning.
pairsley.tile5_body: Your command center for menus, costing, specials, and sourcing.

rosemarie.hero_body: The AI assistant for artisan food producers — mills, bakers, cheesemakers, picklers, preservers, and small-batch shops. Rosemarie helps you turn raw ingredients into finished products, and finished products into a business.
rosemarie.hero_note: Free with any OFN artisan producer account. Chat with Rosemarie using the purple bubble at the bottom-right of this page.
rosemarie.what_body: Rosemarie is a conversational AI built for the people who make things out of what farms grow. She knows flour extraction rates and sourdough hydration. She knows curd cuts and cave humidity. She knows the difference between a vinegar pickle and a lacto ferment, and why your last jar went soft. And she keeps it all tied to your recipes, your batches, and your ingredient suppliers — so the advice is grounded in your actual shop, not a generic textbook.
rosemarie.cap1_body: Browse live OFN listings for grain, milk, fruit, honey, and meat from farms in your state — filter by category or ingredient.
rosemarie.cap2_body: Set par thresholds on your raw-ingredient inventory; Rosemarie drafts a multi-farm restock order the moment you dip below reorder.
rosemarie.cap3_body: Pull up every order waiting on you from restaurants and chefs — confirm them, reject with a reason, or mark them shipped from the chat.
rosemarie.cap4_body: Hand Rosemarie a tracking number and she stamps the order shipped and notifies the buyer — no login to the fulfillment page required.
rosemarie.cap5_body: Update your business name, description, slogan, and website in-chat. See what you're selling and what's running low at a glance.
rosemarie.cap6_body: Milling, fermentation, cheesemaking, preserving, and food-safety guidance — grounded in a curated artisan-producer library, not a generic web search.
rosemarie.q1: "What hard red wheat is available from farms in PA right now?"
rosemarie.q2: "Show me all incoming orders from restaurants that are still pending."
rosemarie.q4: "Set a par of 50 lb on heritage spelt with a reorder threshold of 20 lb."
rosemarie.q5: "What am I running low on in my inventory?"
rosemarie.cta_title: Put Rosemarie to work in your shop
rosemarie.cta_body: Free with any OFN artisan producer account. Rosemarie rides along as a purple bubble on every producer page in the app — tap it and start a conversation.

chef_pantry.hero_body: A complete sourcing and kitchen management suite that connects your restaurant directly to the farms that supply it — marketplace, standing orders, weekly digest, recipes, plate costing, and Pairsley AI, all in one place.
chef_pantry.what_body: The Chef's Digital Pantry is OFN's end-to-end toolkit for food-service professionals. It connects your kitchen directly to farms in your region, gives you a clear view of what's available and at what price, and takes the friction out of sourcing local ingredients at scale — whether you're running a single bistro or a multi-location group.
chef_pantry.feat1_body: Browse produce, meat, and processed goods from farms in your region. Filter by category, distance, or farm. Every listing shows current availability, unit price, and minimum order — no cold calls, no guesswork.
chef_pantry.feat2_body: Save the farms you work with most into a curated shortlist. Quickly re-order from your trusted suppliers, check their current availability, and track your buying history — all in one place.
chef_pantry.feat3_body: Set up recurring weekly, biweekly, or monthly orders with your go-to farms. Choose the day of delivery, quantity, and product — and adjust on the fly when something is short or something new comes in.
chef_pantry.feat4_body: Subscribe to a weekly email that shows everything available from OFN farms right now — or limit it to just your saved farms. Arrive at Monday prep with a clear picture of what's ripe and ready.
chef_pantry.feat5_body: Store your recipes in a structured library tied to your pantry. Attach ingredient quantities, methods, and tags — and pull up any recipe instantly when you're costing a menu or training a new cook.
chef_pantry.feat6_body: Cost any recipe against live wholesale prices from your saved farms. Get a per-plate food cost, food-cost percentage, and suggested menu price at your target margin — updated automatically when farm prices change.
chef_pantry.feat7_body: See all your pending and in-transit orders in one view. Farms mark orders confirmed and shipped with tracking details — and you'll get a notification the moment something changes.
chef_pantry.feat8_body: Pairsley rides along on every chef page. Ask what's available from your farms this week, get a seasonal menu drafted around what's ripe, cost a plate in real time, or set up a standing order — all from one conversation.
chef_pantry.pairsley_body: Pairsley is available as a floating chat bubble on every chef and restaurant page. Here are a few things you can ask her right now:
chef_pantry.step1_body: Search the marketplace, discover farms near you, and save your favorites to My Farms for quick reordering.
chef_pantry.step2_body: Place one-off orders or set up standing orders. Subscribe to the weekly harvest digest to plan your menu before you order.

chef_pantry.cta_body: Free with any OFN restaurant account. Browse the marketplace without an account — sign up to save farms, place orders, and unlock Pairsley.

crop_monitor.hero_body: Field-level imagery and crop-health analytics, built on top of satellite and drone data. See what's thriving and what's struggling before you drive out to look.
crop_monitor.what_body: Draw a polygon around a field once. Crop Monitor pulls the latest satellite passes, computes vegetation indices (NDVI, NDWI, and custom bands), and shows you a heatmap of what's happening across the acreage. Upload drone imagery when you have it and we'll overlay it on the same map. Ask Saige to summarize trouble spots, compare to last year, or schedule scouting when the signal warrants a field visit.
crop_monitor.feat1_body: Regular satellite passes plus drone overlays when you have them. NDVI, moisture, and custom vegetation indices.
crop_monitor.feat2_body: Identify what's growing where — and flag unexpected changes in cover between passes.
crop_monitor.feat3_body: Compare this year to last year at a glance, by field. Spot a dip before it becomes a loss.
crop_monitor.feat4_body: Aggregate views across all your fields — yield proxies, stress hotspots, and rotation outcomes.
crop_monitor.feat5_body: Ask Saige to summarize field health, plan rotations, or flag risk hotspots for next week's weather.
crop_monitor.feat6_body: Log scouting visits directly on the map. Notes stay tied to the field and the date, so a season is a searchable record.
crop_monitor.cta_body: Free tier includes monthly satellite passes on up to three fields. Precision tier adds weekly imagery, drone support, and historical archives.

event_reg_about.hero_body: Turnkey event management built for the ag world — livestock shows, fiber festivals, farm tours, auctions, vendor fairs, competitions, and more. Registration, ticketing, check-in, judging, payouts, and post-event certificates in one place.
event_reg_about.what_title: Built for every shape of ag event
event_reg_about.what_body: Most event platforms treat a livestock show the same as a tech conference. Ours started with the edge cases — fleece judging, barn card printing, halter class brackets — and built out from there. Whatever your event looks like, the registration flow is tuned to what your attendees and exhibitors actually need to tell you.
event_reg_about.type1_desc: Halter, fleece, performance, and breed classes with full judging and barn card printing.
event_reg_about.type2_desc: Vendor booths, fleece judging, spin-offs, workshops, and marketplace all on one platform.
event_reg_about.type3_desc: Custom class structures, judge portals, scorecards, and automated results distribution.
event_reg_about.type4_desc: Speaker portals, agenda builders, session tracks, and certificate printing for attendees.
event_reg_about.type5_desc: Lot registration, bidder check-in, and real-time catalog management.
event_reg_about.type6_desc: Timed-entry ticketing, guided group management, and attendance tracking.
event_reg_about.type7_desc: Booth assignment, exhibitor check-in, lead retrieval for vendors, and floor plan management.
event_reg_about.type8_desc: Seating management, meal selection at registration, and dietary restriction tracking.
event_reg_about.type9_desc: Class capacity limits, material lists, prerequisite flags, and completion certificates.
event_reg_about.type10_desc: Demo schedules, station check-ins, and group size management for educational farm events.
event_reg_about.type11_desc: General admission plus add-ons — VIP passes, shuttle tickets, meal vouchers, and more.
event_reg_about.type12_desc: Free-to-host simple events with headcount tracking and day-of check-in.
event_reg_about.type13_desc: Completion tracking, exam scheduling, and branded certificate generation.
event_reg_about.type14_desc: Member-only registration, voting record tracking, and annual meeting management.
event_reg_about.feat1_body: Create multiple ticket types — general admission, VIP, member pricing, day passes. Add optional meal plans, shuttle tickets, and merchandise. Promo codes, early-bird pricing, and waitlists are all built in.
event_reg_about.feat2_body: Every event gets a public registration page with your logo, banner, schedule, and description. Attendees register directly on OFN — no third-party redirects, no iframe hacks.
event_reg_about.feat3_body: Scan QR codes on arrival or search by name. Print nametags, barn cards, and class sheets from the same dashboard. Works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop.
event_reg_about.feat4_body: Competition and livestock show events include a dedicated judge portal. Assign classes, enter scores, and publish results — all without sharing your admin credentials.
event_reg_about.feat5_body: Conferences get a speaker submission portal, agenda builder with session tracks, and a speaker-facing dashboard. Attendees see the live schedule the moment you publish it.
event_reg_about.feat6_body: Print branded completion certificates for workshops, certifications, and conference attendees. Customize the template with your organization's name, logo, and signatory.
event_reg_about.feat7_body: Exhibitors and sponsors scan attendee badges to capture leads on the show floor. Contacts export to CSV after the event for seamless follow-up.
event_reg_about.feat8_body: Watch registration counts, revenue, and ticket-type breakdowns update live. See attendance by day, demographic summaries, and meal counts — all from your organizer dashboard.
event_reg_about.feat9_body: Stripe powers all ticketing. Funds go directly to your account — no waiting 30 days for a payout. Free RSVPs are always free to host; paid tickets carry a low platform fee.
event_reg_about.feat10_body: Every registration builds an attendee list you own. Send day-of announcements, post-event follow-ups, and year-over-year invitations directly from the platform.
event_reg_about.cta_title: Ready to host your next event?
event_reg_about.cta_body: Free to host simple RSVPs. Paid tickets carry a low platform fee plus Stripe's standard payment processing. No monthly subscription required.

knowledgebases.hero_h1: A trusted source of truth for the food ecosystem.
knowledgebases.hero_body: From the seed catalog a small grower opens in winter, to the breed registry a 4-H club leans on at the county fair, to the ingredient profile a chef pulls up before writing tomorrow's menu — these three databases sit underneath every part of the Oatmeal Farm Network. They're free to browse, deeply linked to the producers and businesses behind them, and built to be cited.
knowledgebases.why_body1: Plants, animals, and finished ingredients each ask different questions of a database. A grower needs growing-zone, soil and pest data; a breeder needs morphology, productivity and registry links; a chef needs flavor, allergen and substitution notes. Splitting them keeps each profile useful instead of compromising on a single one-size-fits-all schema.
knowledgebases.why_body2: They cross-reference where it matters: an ingredient page links to the plant or livestock breed it came from; a breed page links to producers; a plant page links to growers selling its harvest. The same identifiers feed Saige's farm advice, Pairsley's restaurant sourcing, and the Chef's Digital Pantry — so the data you see here is the same data the AI advisors reason from.
knowledgebases.plants_tagline: From staple grains to single-origin spices.
knowledgebases.plants_description: Detailed profiles for every food plant we've documented across 22 categories — grains, legumes, vegetables, fruits, berries, herbs, spices, oilseeds, mushrooms, edible flowers and more. Each entry covers scientific name, varieties, growing conditions, climate zones, harvest timing, common pests, and culinary or processing uses.
knowledgebases.plants_bullet_0: 22 categories — grains, vegetables, fruits, herbs, spices, more
knowledgebases.plants_bullet_2: Growing requirements: zone, soil, water, sun
knowledgebases.plants_bullet_3: Pest & disease references plus companion-planting hints
knowledgebases.plants_bullet_4: Direct links to producers in the Food-System Directory
knowledgebases.livestock_tagline: Every breed worth raising — with the data to prove it.

ingredient_kb.title: Ingredient Knowledgebase
ingredient_kb.hero_body_pre: There are thousands of Ingredients, we have documented
ingredient_kb.hero_body_post: so far. We have the mission to list them all here.
ingredient_kb.hero_body2_pre: We are consistently adding more information and photos to the list. If you would like to help out with photos, descriptions, or correcting errors please
ingredient_kb.hero_body2_post: and let us know — the more people we have helping, the more complete the information.
ingredient_kb.hero_mobile_body2_pre: If you'd like to help with photos or descriptions, please
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_algae: From silky wakame ribbons to umami-rich nori sheets, algae bring the briny depth of the ocean straight to your plate.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_beans: Creamy, hearty, and endlessly versatile — slow-simmered black beans, smoky pintos, and buttery cannellinis are the soul of comfort cooking everywhere.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_berries: Bursting with sweetness and just the right amount of tang, fresh berries turn everything from morning yogurt to evening desserts into something special.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_breads: Few aromas are as irresistible as freshly baked bread — from crusty sourdoughs and pillowy brioche to flatbreads hot off a griddle.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_candy: Pure, playful indulgence — from hand-pulled taffy and silky caramels to bittersweet dark chocolates that melt on the tongue.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_cheeses: Aged, fresh, melted, or crumbled — cheese transforms every dish it touches, from a simple baguette to an elaborate charcuterie board.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_chemicals: The behind-the-scenes heroes of food crafting: leavening agents that make cakes rise, emulsifiers that keep sauces velvety, and preservatives that lock in freshness.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_edible_flowers: Delicate, fragrant, and strikingly beautiful — edible blossoms like nasturtiums, lavender, and rose petals elevate salads, cocktails, and desserts to works of art.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_fish: From flaky pan-seared salmon and crispy fish tacos to delicate crudo and slow-braised branzino — the ocean offers an endless variety of flavors.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_flours: The quiet foundation of baking — fine wheat flour for airy croissants, nutty almond flour for tender macarons, and earthy buckwheat for rustic crepes.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_fruits: Ripe, juicy, and alive with natural sweetness — from fragrant mangoes and tart passion fruit to crisp apples and sun-warmed peaches.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_fungi: Earthy, meaty, and deeply savory — golden chanterelles, velvety porcini, and smoky shiitakes add unmistakable richness to any dish.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_gourds: Roasted butternut squash with brown butter, cool cucumber salads, and pumpkin soups spiced with nutmeg — gourds are the quiet stars of the kitchen.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_grains: The golden backbone of civilizations — nutty farro, fragrant basmati, creamy polenta, and chewy barley each tell a story of land and harvest.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_herbs: A handful of fresh basil, a sprig of rosemary, a scattering of cilantro — herbs are the finishing touch that wakes up every dish.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_juices: Cold-pressed, sun-bright, and brimming with flavor — freshly squeezed citrus, vibrant beet, and sweet pressed apple juice nourish and refresh.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_legumes: Lentil dal fragrant with cumin, silky hummus drizzled with olive oil, and slow-cooked split pea soup — legumes are humble ingredients with extraordinary depth.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_meats: Slow-braised short ribs, crackling roast chicken, smoky pulled pork — expertly sourced and carefully cooked meats are at the heart of celebratory meals worldwide.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_melons: Cool, refreshing, and impossibly sweet — watermelon dusted with tajín, honeydew paired with prosciutto, and cantaloupe straight from the vine define summer eating.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_milks: Creamy whole milk for a perfect béchamel, rich coconut milk for a Thai curry, frothy oat milk for a morning latte — dairy and its alternatives are indispensable.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_mollusks_and_crustaceans: Buttery lobster, briny oysters on the half shell, sweet Dungeness crab — the sea's most prized shellfish are a celebration on every plate.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_nuts: Toasted marcona almonds, rich pecan pralines, creamy cashew sauces — nuts add irresistible crunch, depth, and warmth to both sweet and savory cooking.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_oils: Grassy extra-virgin olive oil, nutty sesame, fragrant truffle — a great oil can transform a simple dish into something truly memorable.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_pastas: Silky tagliatelle tossed in brown butter, al dente rigatoni pulling apart a slow ragù, fresh tortellini in golden broth — pasta is pure comfort.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_peppers: Sweet bell peppers roasted until caramelized, smoky chipotles in adobo, and fresh Thai chilies — peppers bring color, warmth, and fire to the table.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_powders: Vibrant matcha, smoky paprika, earthy turmeric, and tangy sumac — powdered ingredients deliver concentrated flavor in every pinch and spoonful.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_rice: Sticky sushi rice, fragrant jasmine, creamy Arborio for risotto, and nutty wild rice — this ancient grain feeds the world and delights the palate.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_roots: Honey-glazed carrots, silky parsnip purée, peppery raw radish — roots pulled from rich soil carry a natural sweetness and earthiness all their own.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_salts: Flaky Maldon finishing salt, smoky Hawaiian black lava, briny fleur de sel — the right salt doesn't just season, it transforms and illuminates every flavor.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_seeds: Toasted sesame on warm bread, chia seeds swelling in coconut milk, crunchy sunflower seeds scattered over a salad — small but mighty flavor boosters.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_spices: Warm cinnamon, smoky cumin, floral cardamom, fiery gochugaru — spices are the soul of a recipe, turning simple ingredients into unforgettable dishes.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_sugars: Golden caramel, deep molasses, fragrant vanilla sugar, and floral honey — sweetness in all its forms is the finishing grace note of great cooking.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_teas: Smoky lapsang souchong, grassy sencha, floral jasmine, and malty Assam — from meditative morning cups to culinary infusions, tea offers endless depth.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_tubers: Crispy duck-fat potatoes, velvety sweet potato purée, chewy cassava flatbreads — underground tubers are among the most satisfying ingredients on earth.
ingredient_kb.cat_desc_vegetables: Charred leeks, caramelized onions, crisp snap peas straight from the garden — vegetables at their peak are vibrant, sweet, and endlessly inspiring.

plant_kb.title: Online Plant Knowledgebase
plant_kb.hero_body_pre: There are thousands of varieties of plants grown for food, we have documented
plant_kb.hero_body_post: so far. We have the mission to list them all here.
plant_kb.hero_body2_pre: We are consistently adding more information and photos to the list, and we are always finding more varieties. If you would like to help out with photos, descriptions, or correcting errors please
plant_kb.hero_body2_post: and let us know — the more people we have helping, the more complete the information.
plant_kb.hero_mobile_body_pre: There are thousands of varieties of plants grown for food, we have documented
plant_kb.hero_mobile_body2_pre: If you'd like to help with photos or descriptions, please
plant_kb.cat_desc_algaes: Ancient, tide-kissed, and quietly extraordinary — seaweeds and microalgae carry the flavor of the open ocean into broths, salads, and supplements unlike anything grown on land.
plant_kb.cat_desc_berries: There is something almost magical about a perfectly ripe berry — the way a blueberry bursts, a raspberry melts, or a sun-warmed strawberry tastes like summer itself.
plant_kb.cat_desc_bulbs: Onions caramelized low and slow until golden, garlic roasted until it becomes something sweet and almost spiritual — bulbs are the soulful foundation that makes everything else taste better.
plant_kb.cat_desc_corms: Humble and ancient, corms like taro and water chestnuts have nourished whole civilizations — their quiet starchiness a canvas for bold flavors across generations of cooks.
plant_kb.cat_desc_culinary_herbs: A handful of fresh basil torn over warm tomatoes, a fistful of cilantro stirred into a broth at the last moment — herbs are how a cook says "I care" without uttering a word.
plant_kb.cat_desc_edible_flowers: Lavender, nasturtium, rose — edible flowers are proof that the most beautiful things in a garden can also be the most delicious, turning every dish into something that stops people mid-bite.
plant_kb.cat_desc_fruits: From a mango so ripe it drips down your wrist to a crisp apple that snaps clean on an autumn morning — fruit is nature at its most generous, sweet, and alive.
plant_kb.cat_desc_ginkgoes: Survivors of the age of dinosaurs, ginkgo trees carry 200 million years of resilience in their fan-shaped leaves and quietly remarkable edible nuts.
plant_kb.cat_desc_grains: Every loaf of bread, every bowl of rice, every plate of pasta begins with a grain — these small seeds carry the weight of human history and the warmth of a billion home-cooked meals.
plant_kb.cat_desc_grasses: The vast, wind-rippled fields of wheat and the tender shoots of wheatgrass — grasses feed the world quietly and completely, covering the earth in a living, breathing harvest.
plant_kb.cat_desc_leafy_greens: There's a reason every grandmother urged you to eat your greens — spinach wilted in garlic butter, young kale massaged with lemon, tender lettuce barely touched with vinaigrette. They make you feel alive.
plant_kb.cat_desc_legumes: A pot of lentils simmering with cumin and onion, a bowl of black beans slow-cooked since morning — legumes are patient, generous, and the kind of ingredient that feels like a warm embrace.
plant_kb.cat_desc_medicinal_herb: Long before pharmacies, there were gardens — chamomile to calm, echinacea to strengthen, valerian to quiet the mind. Medicinal herbs are humanity's oldest form of care.
plant_kb.cat_desc_mushroom: There is nothing in the food world quite like the deep, woodsy umami of a chanterelle sautéed in butter, or a shiitake that makes a broth taste like it has been cooking for days.
plant_kb.cat_desc_nut: Toasted walnuts warm from the oven, creamy almond butter on morning toast, a single perfect pecan in the center of a praline — nuts are small, but they carry enormous joy.
plant_kb.cat_desc_palms: The coconut cracked open on a beach, dates so sweet they taste like dessert pulled straight from the tree — palms are the taste of warmth, sun, and abundance.
plant_kb.cat_desc_pseudocereal: Quinoa and amaranth fed the Inca and Aztec empires for centuries — these resilient, protein-rich seeds are having a well-deserved renaissance in kitchens around the world.
plant_kb.cat_desc_rhizomes: Fresh ginger grated into a sauce that suddenly sings, turmeric turning a broth a vivid gold — rhizomes grow hidden underground but announce themselves boldly in every dish they touch.
plant_kb.cat_desc_root: Pulled from dark soil, scrubbed clean, and roasted until caramelized at the edges — root vegetables are honest, grounding food that connects us to the earth with every bite.
plant_kb.cat_desc_spices: Cinnamon that makes a kitchen smell like belonging, cardamom that transports you somewhere ancient, smoked paprika that whispers of fire — spices are emotion in powdered form.
plant_kb.cat_desc_tubers: Crispy roasted potatoes with flaky salt, silky sweet potato mash on a cold night, chewy cassava flatbread — tubers are the world's most comforting food, buried treasure waiting to be found.
plant_kb.cat_desc_vegetable: Asparagus in spring, corn in summer, squash in autumn — vegetables mark the seasons better than any calendar, and a garden at peak harvest is one of life's great pleasures.

crop_rotation.select_field_prompt: Select a field to view its rotation history
crop_rotation.insight_consecutive: {{crop}} planted consecutively in {{year1}} and {{year2}} — increases disease and pest pressure.
crop_rotation.insight_legume: Legumes in your rotation fix atmospheric nitrogen, reducing synthetic fertilizer costs for the following crop.
crop_rotation.insight_cover_crop: Cover crops in rotation improve soil organic matter, suppress weeds, and reduce erosion between main seasons.
crop_rotation.insight_strong_diversity: Strong diversity — {{count}} different crops in the last {{seasons}} seasons improves soil biology and breaks pest cycles.
crop_rotation.insight_low_diversity: Low crop diversity. Adding a third crop (e.g. small grain or legume) would significantly improve rotation benefits.
crop_rotation.rec_corn_reason: Breaks corn rootworm cycle; soybeans provide N credit for next season.
crop_rotation.rec_soy_reason: Capitalize on the 30–50 lb/ac nitrogen credit left by soybeans.
crop_rotation.rec_wheat_reason: Legumes after small grains maximize N fixation and allow soil recovery before row crops.
crop_rotation.rec_canola_reason: Avoid canola more than 1-in-3 years due to clubroot risk; grasses restore balance.
crop_rotation.rec_default_reason: Introducing a legume will add nitrogen and diversify your rotation.

ofn_coming_soon.meta_title: Coming Soon: Oatmeal Farm Network Opening for Business | OFN
ofn_coming_soon.meta_desc: Oatmeal Farm Network is launching in 2026 — one integrated platform for farmers, ranchers, restaurants, artisan producers, and agricultural associations.
ofn_coming_soon.hero_title: Coming Soon: Oatmeal Farm Network Is Opening for Business
ofn_coming_soon.hero_subtitle: One integrated platform for the entire local food ecosystem — from field to fork.
ofn_coming_soon.lead_p1: The Oatmeal Farm Network is entering its final phase of preparation before a full 2026 launch — and the platform arriving is unlike anything the agricultural industry has seen before.
ofn_coming_soon.lead_p2: For years, the people who grow, raise, prepare, and celebrate food have been asked to stitch together dozens of disconnected tools: one app for herd records, another for online sales, a spreadsheet for orders, a third-party site for events, and countless email threads to manage relationships with buyers and suppliers. Oatmeal Farm Network was built to end that fragmentation.
ofn_coming_soon.lead_p3: At its core, OFN is a digital nervous system for local and regional food systems — a single, integrated platform where farms, ranches, restaurants, artisan producers, and agricultural associations can all operate, connect, and grow. Every tool on the platform is designed to work together, so that a farm's inventory flows directly into a restaurant's sourcing dashboard, a breed association's registry connects to a rancher's herd records, and an artisan producer's product listing reaches the right chefs without a middleman.
ofn_coming_soon.lead_p4: We are currently onboarding a select group of pilot businesses and associations to refine the experience before opening fully to the public. Whether you are a fourth-generation cattle rancher, a two-year-old craft creamery, or a regional grower cooperative, there will be a place for you here. Read on to learn what OFN will do for each part of the food ecosystem.
ofn_coming_soon.ai_p1: Every account on OFN has access to a suite of AI advisors designed specifically for their role in the food system. Saige assists farmers and ranchers with crop management, herd health, and agronomic questions. Pairsley helps chefs and restaurants develop menus around seasonal local ingredients. Rosemarie guides artisan producers through ingredient traceability and product storytelling. Thaiyme supports food businesses with compliance, labeling, and market intelligence.
ofn_coming_soon.ai_p2: These aren't generic chatbots — they are purpose-built advisors trained on agricultural science, food industry knowledge, and the real-time data flowing through the OFN platform.
ofn_coming_soon.cta_heading: Ready to be part of the network?
ofn_coming_soon.cta_body: Create your free account today. Whether you're a farm, a restaurant, an artisan producer, or an association, your place in the network is waiting.
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_headline: Run a smarter, more connected farm
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_body: Farmers are at the heart of the Oatmeal Farm Network. Whether you grow row crops, fruits, or vegetables, the platform gives you a single home for everything: AI-powered precision agriculture to monitor fields and forecast yields, a direct-to-buyer marketplace to sell local produce, a professional website to tell your story, and event listings to bring your community to your gate. Our AI advisor Saige provides on-demand agronomic guidance tailored to your specific crops, climate, and soil — like having an expert on call, every day of the season.
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_f1: Precision Ag dashboard — satellite NDVI, soil health, GDD, irrigation & yield forecasts
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_f2: Farm-to-Table marketplace — list products and reach local chefs and buyers directly
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_f3: AI Advisor Saige — agronomic Q&A, pest ID, and crop management guidance
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_f4: Farm directory listing — be discovered by buyers, partners, and agritourists
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_f5: Custom farm website — built-in, no coding required
ofn_coming_soon.section_farms_f6: Event registration — host farm tours, pick-your-own days, and workshops
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_headline: Manage your herd and grow your market
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_body: Ranchers can list and sell livestock through a dedicated livestock marketplace, manage herd records and breeding data, and access AI-assisted herd health guidance. The platform connects you with buyers, breed associations, and feed suppliers — all from one dashboard. Whether you run a commercial cow-calf operation or a rare heritage breed ranch, the Oatmeal Farm Network helps you build a business that's visible and thriving year-round.
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_f1: Livestock marketplace — list cattle, sheep, goats, hogs, horses, and more
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_f2: Herd management — track animals, breeding records, and lineage
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_f3: AI Advisor Saige — herd health Q&A and pasture management guidance
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_f4: Ranch directory listing — attract buyers and breeders nationwide
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_f5: Precision Ag tools — field monitoring and pasture productivity tracking
ofn_coming_soon.section_ranches_f6: Association support — connect with breed registries and industry groups
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_headline: Source local. Cook confidently. Build loyalty.
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_body: The Oatmeal Farm Network gives restaurants a direct line to local farms and artisan producers. Browse the Farm-to-Table marketplace by ingredient, season, or region; set up standing orders with your favorite farm; and let our AI chef assistant Pairsley help you craft menus around what's freshest and most available. Your weekly digest tells you exactly what's in season and who has it — so you spend less time sourcing and more time cooking.
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_f1: Chef Pantry — browse and order local ingredients directly from farms
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_f2: Standing orders — schedule recurring deliveries from trusted producers
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_f3: AI Advisor Pairsley — menu ideation and pairing suggestions based on what's in season
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_f4: Restaurant directory listing — be found by food-curious diners in your area
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_f5: Event listings — advertise farm dinners, tastings, and private events
ofn_coming_soon.section_restaurants_f6: Weekly marketplace digest — curated local availability sent to your inbox
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_headline: Bring your craft to a wider table
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_body: Whether you produce small-batch cheese, heritage-grain flour, craft vinegar, fermented foods, or handmade preserves, the Oatmeal Farm Network gives you a marketplace, a story, and an audience. List your products directly to restaurants and consumers, build a brand website, and let AI advisor Rosemarie help you trace your ingredients and communicate the provenance of your craft. Buyers who care about how food is made are looking for you — we make sure they find you.
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_f1: Farm-to-Table marketplace — sell direct to restaurants and consumers
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_f2: AI Advisor Rosemarie — ingredient sourcing, traceability, and product story guidance
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_f3: Artisan directory listing — be discovered by chefs, retailers, and food enthusiasts
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_f4: Custom producer website — showcase your process, values, and products
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_f5: Event listings — farmers' markets, pop-ups, and tasting events
ofn_coming_soon.section_artisan_f6: Association support — connect with food craft guilds and regional producer groups
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_headline: Serve your members. Strengthen your industry.
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_body: Breed registries, grower cooperatives, farm bureaus, and agricultural nonprofits all have one thing in common: they exist to serve their members and advance the industry. The Oatmeal Farm Network provides associations with a full suite of digital infrastructure — member directories, event registration, breed registries, and communications tools — so you can focus on mission rather than administration. Our platform was built from the ground up to handle the complexity of multi-tier membership organizations.
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_f1: Member directory — searchable, branded listing for your entire membership
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_f2: Event registration — full-featured show and conference management
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_f3: Breed registry — lineage records, health data, and EPD management
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_f4: Association website — professional web presence with no technical overhead
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_f5: Email campaigns — newsletters and announcements to your membership
ofn_coming_soon.section_assoc_f6: AI advisor integration — give your members access to expert-level guidance

directory_list.hero_body1: Find what you're looking for across 29 categories — from farms and food hubs to restaurants, fiber mills, and more.
directory_list.hero_body2: Search and connect with local farms, food businesses, and organizations in your area. Want to add your business?
directory_list.cat_agricultural_associations_desc: Trade associations, cooperatives, and advocacy groups that support farmers, ranchers, and food producers across all sectors of agriculture.
directory_list.cat_artisan_producers_desc: Small-batch makers of specialty foods — cheesemakers, bread bakers, jam crafters, and other producers who put craft and care into every product.
directory_list.cat_business_resources_desc: Consultants, lenders, accountants, and support organizations that help farm and food businesses manage finances, compliance, and growth.
directory_list.cat_crafter_organizations_desc: Guilds, co-ops, and collectives for fiber artists, weavers, knitters, and other crafters who work with natural and farm-sourced materials.
directory_list.cat_farmers_markets_desc: Outdoor and indoor markets where farmers, growers, and producers sell directly to consumers — the heartbeat of local food communities.
directory_list.cat_farms_ranches_desc: Working farms and ranches growing crops, raising livestock, and producing the raw ingredients that feed families and supply the food chain.
directory_list.cat_fiber_cooperatives_desc: Member-owned cooperatives that pool fiber resources — raw wool, alpaca, mohair, and more — for processing, marketing, and sale.
directory_list.cat_fiber_mills_desc: Facilities that wash, card, spin, and process raw animal fiber into yarn and textiles for the handcraft and textile industries.
directory_list.cat_fisheries_desc: Aquaculture operations and wild-catch fisheries that produce fish, shellfish, and other seafood for commercial and consumer markets.
directory_list.cat_fishermen_desc: Independent commercial fishermen and small fishing operations harvesting seafood from oceans, lakes, and rivers.
directory_list.cat_food_aggregators_desc: Organizations that consolidate and resell product from multiple farms — connecting smaller producers to wholesale buyers, distributors, and institutional kitchens.
directory_list.cat_food_cooperatives_desc: Member-owned grocery stores and buying clubs that prioritize local sourcing, fair prices, and community ownership of the food supply.
directory_list.cat_food_hubs_desc: Aggregation and distribution centers that help small and mid-scale farms access wholesale markets, schools, hospitals, and retail buyers.
directory_list.cat_grocery_stores_desc: Independent and regional grocery retailers committed to stocking local and regional food products alongside everyday staples.
directory_list.cat_herb_and_tea_producers_desc: Growers and crafters of culinary, medicinal, and aromatic herbs, plus loose-leaf and blended tea producers working from farm to cup.
directory_list.cat_hunger_relief_organizations_desc: Food banks, pantries, rescue programs, and community kitchens that connect surplus farm and food production with families in need.
directory_list.cat_manufacturers_desc: Food and beverage manufacturers that transform raw agricultural ingredients into packaged products for retail, foodservice, and export.
directory_list.cat_marinas_desc: Coastal and inland marinas that support commercial fishing operations, aquaculture businesses, and waterfront food enterprises.
directory_list.cat_meat_wholesalers_desc: Processors and distributors that source whole animals from farms and sell cuts, carcasses, and specialty meats to restaurants and retailers.
directory_list.cat_real_estate_agents_desc: Agents and brokers who specialize in agricultural land, farm properties, rural acreage, and food-business real estate transactions.
directory_list.cat_restaurants_desc: Farm-to-table restaurants, local diners, and food establishments that source directly from farmers and champion regional cuisine.
directory_list.cat_retailers_desc: Specialty food shops, farm stores, and retail outlets that bring locally and regionally produced food products to everyday shoppers.
directory_list.cat_service_providers_desc: Veterinarians, agronomists, equipment dealers, and other service businesses that keep farms and food enterprises running smoothly.
directory_list.cat_transporters_desc: Refrigerated trucking, livestock haulers, and logistics providers that move farm product from field to processor, distributor, and end buyer.
directory_list.cat_universities_desc: Agricultural colleges, land-grant universities, and extension programs that conduct research and provide education to the farming community.
directory_list.cat_veterinarians_desc: Large-animal and mixed-practice veterinarians who provide health care, herd management, and consulting services for livestock producers.
directory_list.cat_vineyards_desc: Grape growers and estate vineyards that cultivate wine grapes, table grapes, and specialty varietals across growing regions.
directory_list.cat_wineries_desc: Craft and commercial wineries that ferment, age, and bottle wine from grapes and other fruits, often sourcing from local vineyards.
directory_list.cat_others_desc: Food system businesses and organizations that don't fit neatly into other categories — from food trucks to community gardens and beyond.

directory_detail.cat_text_business_resources: Consultants, lenders, accountants, and support organizations that help farm and food businesses manage finances, compliance, and growth. Whether you need help with business planning, loans, legal guidance, or marketing — find the right resource here.
